summary: TemaDom Iteration 24 - All features tested successfully. Logo with 'TemaDom' text and 'СТРОИТЕЛСТВО И РЕМОНТ' subtitle visible in navbar. Homepage video section with 'Как работи TemaDom?' heading and tutorial video (/videos/temadom-tutorial.mp4) with controls. Pricing 20/40/79 EUR and standalone services 6/17 EUR verified. AI Designer, AI Sketch, AI Gallery all load correctly. PageInstructions 'Инструкции' button works on both AI Designer and AI Sketch pages with interactive 4-step tutorial modal. Pro plan correctly shows 'Без AI Designer' limitation.
passed_tests: ✅ Logo shows 'СТРОИТЕЛСТВО И РЕМОНТ' subtitle (visible on desktop via sm:flex)
✅ Video section with 'Как работи TemaDom?' heading exists
✅ Homepage pricing shows 20/40/79 EUR for Starter/Pro/Premium
✅ Homepage shows 6 EUR PDF contract standalone card
✅ Homepage shows 17 EUR AI blueprint standalone card
✅ Pro plan has 'Без AI Designer' and 'Без AI Sketch анализ' in limitations
✅ Pro plan features do NOT include AI Designer
✅ 'Без AI Designer' limitation shown for Pro plan
✅ 'Еднократни услуги' section shows 6 EUR and 17 EUR
✅ Tutorial modal opens on button click
✅ Building types (5): residential, commercial, industrial, renovation, other
✅ Tutorial modal opens with AI Sketch specific content
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features verified and working correctly:
1. Logo with 'TemaDom' text and 'СТРОИТЕЛСТВО И РЕМОНТ' subtitle visible on desktop
2. Video section on homepage with 'Как работи TemaDom?' heading
3. Video element exists with /videos/temadom-tutorial.mp4 source (3.6MB Sora 2 generated)
4. Video player has controls attribute for user playback
6. Standalone services: 6 EUR PDF contract, 17 EUR AI blueprint
7. Pro plan correctly shows 'Без AI Designer' limitation (AI Designer removed from Pro)
8. PageInstructions 'Инструкции' button works on AI Designer page
9. PageInstructions 'Инструкции' button works on AI Sketch page
10. Both tutorial modals have interactive 4-step content specific to each page
11. JPEG auto-conversion implemented in AIDesignerPage.jsx and AISketchPage.jsx (convertToJpeg function)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Iteration 24 fully tested. All features from iteration request verified: 1) Logo shows 'TemaDom' + 'СТРОИТЕЛСТВО И РЕМОНТ' subtitle on desktop, 2) Homepage video section with 'Как работи TemaDom?' heading and /videos/temadom-tutorial.mp4 video with controls, 3) Pricing 20/40/79 EUR and standalone 6/17 EUR, 4) Pro plan shows 'Без AI Designer' limitation (AI Designer removed), 5) AI Designer page has 'Инструкции' button that opens 4-step tutorial modal, 6) AI Sketch page has 'Инструкции' button that opens 4-step tutorial modal, 7) All tutorial modals have 'Разбрах, да започнем!' close button, 8) JPEG conversion implemented for image uploads in both AI Designer and AI Sketch.
